productDisplayName: Colorbar Velvet Matte Brick-O-La Lipstick 42 M
description: Shade NameBrick-O-La 42 MWhat it is?Colorbar velvet matte lipstickWhat it does?Enriched with Vitamin EFeatures unique 2-in-1 formulationGives a creamy yet matte finish to the lipsHighly pigmentedStays for 8 hours without budging, feathering or bleedingHow to Use the product?Start applying this lipstick in the middle of the lips, smoothing out to the corners of the mouth or apply with a lip brush.First apply to the center of lips and then blend outwards.About the brandFounded in 2004, Colorbar is among the leading brands of colour cosmetics in India and is extremely popular among the urban women. It promises to provide its customers the trendy makeup, covering a wide range of colours with a belief of redefining the chic and sensual woman of today.
